title: Media Centre
content:
Welcome to our Media Centre. For all media inquiries, interviews, or expert commentary on business law matters, please don’t hesitate to contact us. Our team is ready to assist you.
- Miriam Beauchamp Manager, External Communications Montréal mbeauchamp@mccarthy.ca
Manager, External Communications
mbeauchamp@mccarthy.ca
- Drew Hasselback Communications Specialist Toronto dhasselback@mccarthy.ca
Communications Specialist
dhasselback@mccarthy.ca
